recommendations.title: Detachment
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of three weeks in the lives of several high school teachers, administrators and students through the eyes of substitute teacher, Henry Barthes. Henry roams from school to school, imparting modes of knowledge, but never staying long enough

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.

recommendations.title: The Real Life of Teachers
recommendations.overview: A comedy about a band of voyeuristic students who take their jobs at the school paper to extremes, deciding to uncover the real lives of their teachers.

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: The Wailer
recommendations.overview: On their way to Mexico, six students are stranded in a small town where years before a tragedy took place.

recommendations.title: Ride Like a Girl
recommendations.overview: The story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup.

recommendations.title: Trick 'r Treat
recommendations.overview: Four interwoven stories that occur on Halloween: an everyday high school principal has a secret life as a serial killer; a college virgin might have just met the one guy for her; a group of teenagers pull a mean prank, and a bitter old recluse receiv

recommendations.title: Another Round
recommendations.overview: Four stagnant high school teachers decide to test out a theory that maintaining a constant level of intoxication will improve their overall lives.

recommendations.title: The Macaluso Sisters
recommendations.overview: Maria, Pinuccia, Lia, Katia and Antonella are five sisters who live in an apartment in Palermo. They make a living by renting doves for ceremonies. On a normal day at the beach, tragedy strucks.

recommendations.title: The Under-Gifted
